indicators.name: absence of cooking appliances
indicators.rationale: No stove, oven, or microwave is visible, making it impossible to perform cooking tasks.

indicators.name: absence of water fixture
indicators.rationale: No sink is present, which is essential for food preparation and kitchen hygiene.

indicators.name: soft plant leaves
indicators.rationale: The soft plant leaves could be hazardous when handling hot pots and pans.

indicators.name: no hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertop or hard washable work surface is present, which is required for all food preparation tasks.

indicators.name: no visible cooking utensils or tools
indicators.rationale: No cooking utensils or tools are visible, which are essential for cooking.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking. There are no cooking appliances, no sink, no hard prep surfaces, and no visible cooking utensils or tools. The presence of soft plant leaves poses a safety hazard when handling hot pots and pans. The space is not designed for cooking activities and receives the minimum score of 1.
